title: Our Love Story
paragraphs: My Premii, my Pakhiii, my Bibijan — today marks 6 months of us. A long-distance love stronger than 190 km, stronger than time.
We started as friends… "We were friends first — that's why we became everything to each other."
17 June 2025 — the day our hearts officially joined.
You are my: Sweetheart, Golappp, Bou, Valobashaa, Dreamy, Happiness, Queen. And I am your: My Dear Husband, Jamai, Baby, Idiot.
Six months with you feels like six chapters of infinity. And I want the whole book with only you.
